mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reference_solution (problem_id, language, solution_code, time_complexity, space_complexity, explanation, hints, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{language}, #{solutionCode}, #{timeComplexity}, #{spaceComplexity}, #{explanation}, #{hints}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reference_solution SET language = #{language}, solution_code = #{solutionCode}, time_complexity = #{timeComplexity}, space_complexity = #{spaceComplexity}, explanation = #{explanation}, hints = #{hints}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT language FROM reference_solution WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
